codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements. The Tauri sync beacon push command accepts an optional frontend-provided machine name and prefers it over host fallback, while project status now carries last-commit metadata through the backend and daemon bridge so sync beacon payloads include commit hash, message, and timestamp without the extra log lookup.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The tauri-fullstack skill mandates browser verification for every change, but this worker's deviation was reasonable because the feature was backend/data-plumbing only and the feature contract required only cargo test and bun run typecheck.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback marks procedure deviation for step 6 Manual Verification; feature verificationSteps in mission features.json list only `cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && cargo test` and `bun run typecheck`.

summary: Pass. No blocking or non-blocking code issues found in commit 7ddc406. The implementation correctly fixes machine-name precedence and commit-metadata propagation; one shared-state observation notes the skill should explicitly allow skipping browser verification for non-visual plumbing changes.
